    "code_snippet": "cursor.execute(f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}')",

}

ALdeci CTEM+ Native Scanner, OSS/SCA, and AutoFix Engine API tests.

Covers all 8 built-in scanners, OSS tools (Trivy/Grype/Sigstore/OPA), AutoFix engine (10 fix types), SBOM/Validation, and Brain Pipeline CTEM lifecycle.

These endpoints work AIR-GAPPED — no external tool dependencies required.
